rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by fixing type mismatches in AGREE expressions
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Use AGREE scalar types: int, real, and bool
generic_rules: Preserve existing architecture when repairing validator diagnostics
Use only visible identifiers when writing repairs
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use AGREE logical operators: and, or, not(...), and implication =>
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not add architecture to fix validator diagnostics
Do not use invalid AGREE type names like integer or boolean
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
